snapshot.title: Implement JWT-based campus context using Clerk session claims
snapshot.description: Migrate from header-based campus context (x-campus-id) to JWT-based approach using Clerk's session claims. This eliminates DB lookups for campus access validation on every request, improves performance, and follows enterprise security best practices. Campus context will be embedded in the JWT token, which is cryptographically signed and cannot be tampered with by clients.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Add allowedCampuses and activeCampusId to Clerk session claims
Create /auth/switch-campus endpoint to issue new session with different active campus
Update CampusGuard to read campus from JWT claims instead of header
Update @CampusContext decorator to extract from JWT claims
Frontend: Remove x-campus-id header injection from API client
Frontend: Update campus switching to call /auth/switch-campus endpoint
Frontend: Decode campus info from Clerk session for UI display
Backward compatibility: Support header fallback during migration (optional)
Performance improvement verified (no DB lookup for campus validation)
